page_metadata.biotools__summary: dbDEMC (database of Differentially Expressed MiRNAs in human Cancers) is an integrated database that designed to store and display differentially expressed microRNAs cancers detected by high-throughput and low-throughput methods.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: dbDEMC (database of Differentially Expressed MiRNAs in human Cancers) is an integrated database that designed to store and display differentially expressed microRNAs cancers detected by high-throughput and low-throughput methods.
